error.missing_dependencies: systemctl, systemd-run, systemd-inhibit, and sleep are required.
error.state_mismatch: The requested state could not be confirmed.

disabled.body: The normal lid-close behavior has been restored.
disabled.title: Lid Guard disabled

enabled.body: Closing the laptop lid will no longer suspend it.
enabled.title: Lid Guard enabled

tooltip.active: Lid Guard is on — closing the lid will not suspend the laptop
tooltip.inactive: Lid Guard is off — click to keep the laptop awake with the lid closed
